title: helictotrichon pratense subsp. hirtifolium
intro: Helictotrichon pratense subsp. hirtifolium, also known as the hairy-leaved false oat-grass, is a plant species within the Poaceae family. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Helictotrichon pratense subsp. hirtifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific study.
